message:
Editable workspace names via click-to-edit toolbar title

Replace the static navigation title with a borderless NSTextField
in the toolbar that looks like a plain label but becomes editable
on click. The ToolbarTextField subclass finds its containing
NSToolbarItem and sets isBordered=false to strip the default
macOS toolbar chrome.

Also removes the name section from the notes panel and the inline
rename from the sidebar — workspace names are now edited only from
the toolbar title.
